package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
)

// scenario for panic_on_error: err != nil branches that jump straight to panic or log.Fatal style exits.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: errors; severity: warning.
func scenario306Negative(err error) error {
	if err != nil { return fmt.Errorf("operation failed: %w", err) }
	return nil
}
